title: cedrus libani
intro: Cedrus libani, also known as the Cedar of Lebanon, is a coniferous evergreen tree native to the mountains of Lebanon. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, with medicinal properties attributed to its essential oils, which contain compounds such as terpenes and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Cedar of Lebanon include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Cedrus libani include essential oils, tea, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
